subject: docs(claude): align CLAUDE.md with glow-props standard format
body:
Restructure synctone's CLAUDE.md to match the shared glow-props template
while preserving all Expo/React Native specifics, database schema, tone tags,
push notifications, spam prevention, and librsvg icon generation content.

Changes:
- Rename heading from "My Preferences" to standard format with reminders
- Standardize Principles to 7 (matching glow-props), move 5 extras to AI Notes
- Add REMINDER blocks after Process, Principles, and AI Notes sections
- Add Triggers section (full 10-trigger system with aliases and behavior)
- Restructure Documentation from Core/Reference/Historical tiers to standard
  9-file managed set plus Additional Project Documentation table
- Simplify session workflow to match glow-props 4-step format
- Move Commit Message Format into Code Standards section (was separate)
- Add missing prohibition: no interactive prompts/selection UIs
- Add Suggested Implementations section adapted for Expo/React Native:
  PWA (custom Expo web setup), Debug System, App Icons (librsvg),
  Download as PDF, HTTPS Proxy, Timer Leak Fix, Key Lessons
- Remove duplicate Commit Message Format from "Instructions for Claude"

Tags: documentation, alignment, claude-md, glow-props
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: claude-md-alignment
Semver: patch
